codeReview.summary: The change cleanly extracts the existing Go-version parser into a pure helper and adds focused regression tests for below-minimum, unparseable, simulated-success, and future-version cases without changing the observable CLI behavior.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, relevant mission/library context, and commit 96465c6 diff. The implementation now exercises the unsupported Go-version validation path required by VAL-CROSS-007 and I found no high-confidence actionable bugs in scope.
